data.title: test_pre_bash_dispatcher_record_test_status_attest_allowed only asserts exit code, not block behavior
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor verification finding.
Finding: test_pre_bash_dispatcher_record_test_status_attest_allowed only asserts exit code is not 2, which passes even if the guard is completely absent. It should also assert the command runs through successfully (not just not-blocked).
File: tests/hooks/test-pre-bash-dispatcher.sh
Category: verification
